revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-020

1. An apparatus in which a gas or vapour burns to produce a flame used directly or with a mantle as a source of light.

2. That part of the apparatus where the flame is produced. (Figs. 20 and 21)

{{IALAFooter}}
